name: js-smart-table-of-contents
title: Smart Table of Contents
shortDescription: Advanced Smart Table of Contents web part for modern SharePoint pages.
longDescription: A lightweight non-React SPFx web part that generates a smart table of contents from modern SharePoint page headings.

Supports ScrollSpy active heading tracking, smooth scrolling, floating drawer mode, inline mode, nested heading expansion, heading search, configurable heading depth, section numbering, and reading time estimation.

thumbnails.alt: Smart Table of Contents floating drawer mode
